titleStmt.title: SII 9.653: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 653. (A.R. No. 13 of 1904.) ON THE NORTH BASE OF THE MANDAPA IN FRONT OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE OF THE VITTHALASVAMI TEMPLE AT HAMPI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1476, Ānanda, Nija-Āshāḍha, śu. 12, Guruvāra corresponding to A.D. 1554 July 12 Thursday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya. It records that Udagiri-Timmarājaya-Mahā-arasu, son of Kōnēṭayadēva-Mahā-arasu and grandson of Ārivīṭi Rāmarājaya-Koṇḍayadēva-Mahā-arasu, made a gift of the village, Tirumalāpura, a suburb of Koṇḍakundi situated in Puliyēru-māgaṇe, a division of Guttiya-sīme, for mounting the god Viṭṭhalasvāmi on the see-saw, in the maṇḍapa erected by him for the purpose, on the Prathama-Ēkādaśī and Dvādaśī festival days and for offerings to the god on those days. The revenue of the village was gadyāṇas 600 per year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷū 1476 neya Ānaṁdasaṁva charada nijaĀṣāḍha śu 12 guruvārādallu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāsivadēvamahārāyaru pruthvīrājyaṁ geyivutaṁ yiralu śrīviṭhaladēvara Amrutapaḍi pudiveṭu naivēdyake Ātrēyagōtrada Āpastaṁbhasūtrada yajuśśākhādhyāyarāda Ārivīṭi rāmarājakoṁḍaya
dēvamahāarasugaḷa pautrarāda kōnēṭayadēvamahāarasugaḷa komārarāda Udagiri tiṁmarājayadēvamahāarasugaḷu taṁma taṁde kōnēṭayaga pu(ṁ)ṇyavāgabēkeṁdu prathamayēkādaseya dvādaseya pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu śrīviṭhaladēvarige taṁma Ubhayavāgi kaṭisida Uyyālemaṁṭapadallu tāu taṁma Ubhayavāgi māḍisuva Uyyāleya tirunāḷu
Uṁyāle tirunāḷu dina 5 koḍe tirunāḷu dina 5 tiruvadhyāna tirunāḷu dina 10 tēru tirunāḷu dhvajārōhaṇa di 3 śrīpuśyayāga di 3 śrīrāmajayaṁti di 1 śrī nārasiṁhvajayaṁti di 1 kruṣṇajayanti di 3 vāmanajayaṁti di 1 Ā tiṁmarājana Ubhaya Uchaha dina 31 kkaṁ dina 1 kaṁ tara 20 lū varuśa 1 kaṁ ca ga 62 kaṁ guttiya sīmeya voḷagaṇa puliyēṟu māgaṇige saluva koṁḍakuṁ
diya voḷage khaṁḍitavāda tirumalāpurada grāma 1 kaṁ rēkhe va ga 600 kaṁ śrīviṭhaladēvaru Uyāleya maṁṭapadali citayisiyidu naivēdyavaha Uchaha bage 4 kaṁ dina 30 kaṁ naḍeva paḍitara vivara di 1 kaṁ hari 1 kaṁ Akki paḍi 8 lū hari 40 kaṁ Akki hesaru Upu meṇasu saṁbhāra mēlōgara tupa mosaru saha ga 4 ¥ 1 kajhāyada bage 5 kkaṁ 500 kaṁ
Akki bella tupa davasa saṁbhāra saha Ø ge 2 . 4 . pala nayivēdyakke Eḷanīru teṁginakāyi bāḷehaṁṇu kaḍalēbēḷe hesarabēḷe kabu mēdarasvarūpa saha Ø ga 2 . paṁju 100 Eṁṇe dīvige tupa saha Ø ga 4 kuṁbārūpa bāḷekaṁbha saha ga ¥ 3 . Aḍugabu Aḍugari Aḍugarisuva kūli saha ga 12 saṁji kūli hiṭu kuṭṭōdu gōdhi bīsuva kūli hoṟegūli saha ga ¥ 1 hūu ga 2 gaṁdha parimaḷa ga ¥ 1 Aṁtu
doḍavara ga 20 lū dina 27 dhvajārōhaṇa saṁmaṁdha rātreya Uchaha yillade hagaluchahavāha saṁmaṁdha niṁtadu paṁju Eṁṇe kūlibagelū ca ga 0 . 3 . kaṁ veca dhvajā rōhaṇada dhvajastaṁbhada nayivēdyake pūje ga 1 kaṁ Akki hesaru ca ga 3 mēlōgara Upu meṇasu tupa mosaru bella bāḷehannu saha ca ga 1 teṁginakāyi ca ga 1 Aḍu gu ca ga . 3 . Aṁtu ca ga 5 . 3 . kaṁ
sale gaṭi ga 4 ¥ 3 . nittakaṭaḷe va gaṁ 15 Ubhayaṁ dina 1 kaṁ ta ga 20 lū vi 3 Aṁtu puliveṭu vaga 3 . yidake dharmmakartārāda Udagiri ti(ṁ)mmarājayyanava rige cāryara komārarāda śrīraṁgācāryarige veṁkaṭa maṁṭapada pra da bhāga yeṁdu koṭadu hāga pālu dēvara śrī bhaṁḍā
rakaṁ pālu Are sthānaveca pālu caḷada cavana yāga pālu caḷa �yo mariyādeyalu naḍeyaluḷḷadu �yo dharmake Ārobaru tapidaru śrīviṭhaladēvara śrīcaraṇakke tappidavarū Eṁdu bareda dharmasāsana śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.653 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
